verses.1: This is what Isaiah the son of Amoz saw concerning Judah and Jerusalem.
verses.2: It shall happen in the latter days, that the mountain of the LORD’s house shall be established on the top of the mountains,
verses.3: Many peoples shall go and say,
verses.4: He will judge between the nations,
verses.5: House of Jacob, come, and let’s walk in the light of the LORD.
verses.6: For you have forsaken your people, the house of Jacob,
verses.7: Their land is full of silver and gold,
verses.8: Their land also is full of idols.
verses.11: The lofty looks of man will be brought low,
verses.12: For there will be a day of the LORD of Armies for all that is proud and arrogant,
verses.13: for all the cedars of Lebanon, that are high and lifted up,
verses.16: for all the ships of Tarshish,
verses.17: The loftiness of man shall be bowed down,
verses.18: The idols shall utterly pass away.
verses.19: Men shall go into the caves of the rocks,
verses.20: In that day, men shall cast away their idols of silver
verses.21: to go into the caverns of the rocks,
verses.22: Stop trusting in man, whose breath is in his nostrils;
